subcategory: hero section with brand logos and purple gradient
use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS and tech products seeking a premium dark aesthetic
Product showcase landing pages requiring visual impact and brand credibility
Marketing pages that need gradient backgrounds with glass-like decorative elements
ai_summary: A full-height hero component featuring a dark purple/pink gradient background, glass-like blur effects with radial gradient blobs, and grid-based vertical dividers. Contains layered decorative elements for visual depth and includes space for brand logos. Ideal for landing pages and product showcases in tech and creative industries.
